# Rei Nuttanon

> Builder. Fighter. Creator. — A person, not a brand.

A Thai full-stack developer based in Bangkok, Thailand. Personal site at https://reinatt.com — portfolio + blog.

## About

Rei Nuttanon (display name: Rei). Full-stack developer since age 19, currently 33. Based in Bangkok, Thailand.

Between ages 27 and 33, ran an idol management company in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam, for six years — managed seven artists and composed three original music tracks. The company is now closed; Rei relocated back to Bangkok and is rebuilding finances after that period.

Writes about building, operating, and surviving small businesses from a non-Western perspective — at the intersection of tech, entertainment-industry operations, and the rebuild story honestly told. Voice has creative range: posts about dev craft and business operating sit alongside posts on film, music, photography, fashion, and design observation.

Languages: English (fluent), Thai (fluent), Vietnamese (basic), Japanese (basic).

## Site map

- [/](https://reinatt.com/) — Home: identity paragraph, recent writing, selected work
- [/writing](https://reinatt.com/writing) — All long-form posts (reverse-chronological)
- [/work](https://reinatt.com/work) — Selected portfolio entries (curated, not exhaustive)
- [/about](https://reinatt.com/about) — Longer-form bio, career arc, the rebuild story
- [/now](https://reinatt.com/now) — Sivers-style "what Rei is doing now" page
- [/rss.xml](https://reinatt.com/rss.xml) — RSS feed of new writing
- [/sitemap-index.xml](https://reinatt.com/sitemap-index.xml) — Full sitemap

## Optional

- [Source code](https://github.com/HumanThrive/reinatt-site) — This site is open source
